name: mode-toggle
visual_summary: The mode-toggle component is a small, toggle-like button that switches between light and dark modes in an application. It is typically used as a header element to change the color scheme of an app. This component is ideal for applications that require frequent changes in mode.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: mode-toggle
Description: The mode-toggle component is a small, toggle-like button that switches between light and dark modes in an application. It is typically used as a header element to change the color scheme of an app. This component is ideal for applications that require frequent changes in mode.
Style: minimal, flat
Interactions: toggle, clickable
Tags: mode-toggle, switch, style-switcher, theme-toggle

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
